tagline: Real-time money streaming protocol built natively on Initia
description: Fluvio is the first native money streaming protocol on Initia. Stream INIT token by the millisecond — salaries, subscriptions, grants, rentals — paid continuously on-chain every 100ms. Unlike Superfluid on Ethereum which fakes streaming with JavaScript math, Fluvio updates real on-chain state every block.
features: Live dashboard with animated progress bars
Explore tab showing all on-chain streams
